title: Citrusy Thai Feta Northern Thai Noodles
description: A twist on traditional Northern Thai noodles, featuring crispy fried shallots and tangy citrus zest, served with crumbled feta cheese.

ingredients.name: Fried shallots
ingredients.notes: see notes for fried shallot recipe

instructions: Cook fettuccine noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Thai chilies and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until slightly softened.
Add the fried shallots, palm sugar, and fish sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and top with crumbled feta cheese, citrus zest, and chopped cilantro.
Drizzle with additional vegetable oil if needed and serve immediately.
Serve with lime wedges on the side.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
